answer:
Alright, let me think… So, honestly, one class that really changed my perspective during high school was AP Psychology. The teacher, Mrs. Reynolds, she was just phenomenal. I mean, she had this way of making complex theories about human behavior super relatable—I swear, some days it felt more like a TED Talk than a regular lecture. 

The subject itself fascinated me. We talked about everything from how memory works to why people procrastinate, and, you know, it got me questioning my own habits and thought processes. Mrs. Reynolds encouraged us to dig deeper, to not just accept things at face value but really analyze the “why” behind everyday actions. That totally shifted the way I see the world.

This class actually sparked my interest in mental health, so when it came time to decide on a college major, I leaned toward psychology, no question about it. And I still use concepts I learned there in my daily life—whether I’m dealing with stress or helping a friend through something tough. So, all in all, AP Psych wasn’t just another class for me; it played a huge role in shaping who I am and what I want to do in the future.
title:
Describe an important class that impacted you during school. 
What was the class subject? 
Who was the teacher? 
How did this class influence you or your choices?
extData:
{"pronuncFile":"/20251027/d2687bcf174b46639a3d846faaf073ce.mp3","answerTemplate":"开题陈述
Begin with a general statement about meaningful classes:  
"Throughout my school life, there have been many classes, but [name of class] stands out as particularly important to me."

正文
课程主题
Briefly introduce the subject and its relevance:  
"This class was about [subject], and I found it especially [interesting/useful/challenging] because [reason]."

教师
Describe the teacher's role and style:  
"The teacher, [teacher’s name], was really [adjective: inspiring, supportive, knowledgeable], and he/she taught us in a way that [explanation, e.g., encouraged participation or made complex ideas simple]."

对你的影响
Explain how this class impacted you:  
"This class influenced me by [effect, such as changing my perspective, motivating me to pursue a certain career, or developing a skill]."  
"Thanks to this experience, I decided to [action/choice, like study more about the subject, join a club, or choose my major]."

总结
Summarize the importance of the class:  
"In conclusion, taking [name of class] with [teacher’s name] played a significant role in shaping my interests and choices."  
End with a personal reflection:  
"I am really grateful for having experienced this class, as it has had a lasting impact on my life."","titleTranslate":"描述一门在学校期间对你产生影响的重要课程。
这门课的科目是什么？
老师是谁？
这门课如何影响了你或你的选择？"}
